_note: All six checkpoints read the raw config files and parse them as JSONC (process_checks/lib/jsonc), NOT via the verifier's check-setting/keybindings endpoints. Reason: VSCode ships/edits these files as JSONC (comment headers, trailing commas) and the verifier's strict json.loads reports a VSCode-valid file as unreadable -- a confirmed false negative (live run 2026-07-18). The predicates are unchanged in meaning; only the read channel moved.

checkpoints.description: editor.cursorStyle is block in user settings.json
ctrl+shift+n bound to workbench.action.files.newUntitledFile on the same binding entry
checkpoints.eval: isinstance(result, list) and any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+shift+n' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.files.newuntitledfile' for b in result)

checkpoints.description: ctrl+shift+w bound to workbench.action.closeAllEditors on the same binding entry
checkpoints.eval: isinstance(result, list) and any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+shift+w' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.closealleditors' for b in result)

checkpoints.description: ctrl+alt+s bound to workbench.action.files.saveAll on the same binding entry
checkpoints.eval: isinstance(result, list) and any(isinstance(b, dict) and str(b.get('key', '')).lower() == 'ctrl+alt+s' and str(b.get('command', '')).lower() == 'workbench.action.files.saveall' for b in result)
